summary: Iteration 20: Email verification enforcement and Google OAuth testing complete. All 27 tests passed. Unverified users are blocked (403) from protected operations (create projects, AI generation, sandbox, deployments). Read-only endpoints remain accessible. Google OAuth redirect working with correct client_id.
passed_tests: GET /api/health - health check returns healthy status
POST /api/auth/login - works for unverified users (can still sign in)
POST /api/projects - unverified user gets 403 with descriptive message
GET /api/auth/google - redirects to Google OAuth (307) with correct client_id
Verified user can use AI execute (200)
403 response includes descriptive message about email verification
critical_code_review_comments: require_verified_email dependency correctly implemented in core/security.py (lines 63-70)
403 response message is descriptive: 'Email verification required. Please check your inbox and verify your email address.'

Protected endpoints using require_verified_email: POST /projects, POST /ai/generate, POST /ai/execute, POST /autonomous/sandbox/execute, POST /autonomous/sandbox/run-tests, POST /autonomous/validate-loop, POST /deploy/{id}
Read-only endpoints correctly use get_current_user (not require_verified_email): GET /projects, GET /user/credits, GET /plans, GET /autonomous/feedback/stats
Google OAuth configured with real credentials in backend/.env
Resend verification endpoint exists at POST /api/auth/resend-verification
seed_data_creation: Created new unverified user for each test run (uuid-based email). Manually set test_refactor@example.com to email_verified=true in MongoDB for regression tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 20 verified email verification enforcement. Unverified users get 403 on protected operations with descriptive message. Read-only endpoints remain accessible. Google OAuth redirect working. MOCKED: JengaHQ payment (demo mode), AI generation (demo mode when XAI_API_KEY not set). The test user test_refactor@example.com was manually verified in DB for regression tests.

mocked_features.JengaHQ payment: Demo mode when JENGA_API_KEY not set - auto-activates subscriptions
mocked_features.AI generation: Demo mode when XAI_API_KEY not set - returns demo content

email_verification_enforcement.403_message: Email verification required. Please check your inbox and verify your email address.
